message:
feat(reactor): implement actual epoll registration with EPOLLET

- Enable unsafe code in epoll module for BorrowedFd operations
- Implement register() with actual epoll_ctl ADD via polling crate
- Implement modify() with actual epoll_ctl MOD
- Implement deregister() with actual epoll_ctl DEL
- Add poll_readable and poll_writable tests verifying real I/O events
- Update documentation to reflect working implementation

The reactor now performs actual fd registration with epoll, enabling
real I/O event notification in edge-triggered mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
